name: Hazelnut Chicken with Orange Thyme Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 skinless, boneless chicken breast, lightly pounded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast in half.
2. Mix together the hazelnuts, bread crumbs, and thyme for the crumb mixture. Set aside.
3. Prepare the egg wash by lightly beating the egg with water and adding salt and pepper.
4. Dredge the chicken breasts in flour, then dip into the egg wash, and coat with the hazelnut crumb mixture. Shake off any excess.
5. Chill the coated chicken until ready to use.
6. Melt the butter in a heavy skillet over moderate heat.
7. Cook the chicken breasts until golden brown on both sides, about 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Add the reserved orange juice, thyme, and hazelnut liqueur to the pan. Stir gently and simmer until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
9. Add the orange sections and season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Remove the chicken breasts from the pan and spoon the sauce over them. Serve.
